description: Recto (secondary use): List of distribution of meat to/by some named individuals including the prices and amounts. The hand is probably known. Many names listed, including: Ismāʿīl; Abū l-Ḥasan al-ʿAsqalānī; Sayf b. ʿAlī; Ẓāfir; Sumʿān; Avraham; Abū Bakr b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān; Qāsim b. Khiḍr; Abū l-[...] b. Yosef.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
